display.purpose: Greeting / page H1. Fraunces serif, one per screen.

headline.purpose: Section headings within a flow. Fraunces.

title.purpose: Card titles and affirmations. Fraunces, the app's voice.

body.purpose: Default UI + prose. Geist. Cap prose at 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Meta text and small captions. Geist.

shadows.name: hairline-ring
shadows.purpose: The only 'elevation' — a light-on-dark 1px ring that separates a surface from the aubergine ground. Depth is tonal, not cast.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: Default ease-out for state transitions and reveals (~150-250ms).

motion.name: nav-indicator
motion.purpose: GSAP slide of the bottom-nav active indicator; snaps instantly under reduced motion.

motion.name: breathe
motion.purpose: The mascot / mood-avatar 'breathing' pulse. Always paired with a reduced-motion off switch.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Translucent gold primary action — glows rather than blocks. One primary per screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary, #E7B65E) 55%, transparent); background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary, #E7B65E) 15%, transparent); color: var(--foreground, #F3EFFA); font: 500 0.875rem Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; backdrop-filter: blur(12px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.1s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary, #E7B65E) 25%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--primary, #E7B65E); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary, #E7B65E) 50%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: The workhorse secondary action — aubergine-tinted transparent fill with a hairline edge.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.16); background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--background, #1B1726) 40%, transparent); color: var(--foreground, #F3EFFA); font: 500 0.875rem Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; backdrop-filter: blur(4px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(4px); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #251F32; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; border-color: var(--primary, #E7B65E); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary, #E7B65E) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Card (solid)
components.description: Default plum surface card, separated from the ground by a hairline ring — no shadow.
components.html:
Deine Werte

Ein kurzer Schritt, der dein Selbstvertrauen stärkt.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; padding: 16px; border-radius: 14px; background: var(--card, #221C30); color: var(--card-foreground, #F3EFFA); box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(243,239,250,0.10); overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-title { font: 500 1rem Fraunces, Georgia, serif; line-height: 1.35; } .ds-card-desc { font: 400 0.875rem Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; line-height: 1.5; color: var(--muted-foreground, #A89FBE); margin: 0; }

components.name: Card (glass)
components.description: Frosted hero card — reserved for 1-2 moments per screen so the ambient blobs glow through.
components.html: Ich habe das Recht, um Hilfe zu bitten.
components.css: .ds-card-glass { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; padding: 16px; border-radius: 14px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); backdrop-filter: blur(16px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px); color: #F3EFFA; } .ds-card-eyebrow { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 999px; background: color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary, #E7B65E) 15%, transparent); color: var(--primary, #E7B65E); } .ds-affirm { margin: 0; font: 500 1.125rem Fraunces, Georgia, serif; line-height: 1.6; color: rgba(243,239,250,0.9); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Transparent-on-aubergine field with a hairline stroke; gold focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 32px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.16); background: color-mix(in oklch, #251F32 30%, transparent); color: var(--foreground, #F3EFFA); font: 400 1rem Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s, box-shadow 0.15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--muted-foreground, #A89FBE); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: var(--primary, #E7B65E); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, var(--primary, #E7B65E) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Solid gold pill for status/counts — Gold Ink text, never white.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 20px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 26px; background: var(--primary, #E7B65E); color: #2B1B06; font: 500 0.75rem Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Bottom Nav Tab
components.description: Mobile tab: icon + text-xs label, gold when active with a sliding gold indicator.
components.html: StartIch
components.css: .ds-nav { position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-around; max-width: 32rem; margin: 0 auto; height: 64px; background: color-mix(in oklch, #1B1726 70%, transparent); backdrop-filter: blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px); border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); } .ds-nav-tab { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px; padding: 6px 12px; font: 500 0.75rem Geist, system-ui, sans-serif; color: var(--muted-foreground, #A89FBE); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s; } .ds-nav-tab:hover { color: var(--foreground, #F3EFFA); } .ds-nav-active { color: var(--primary, #E7B65E); position: relative; } .ds-nav-active::after { content: ""; position: absolute; bottom: -4px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 32px; height: 2px; border-radius: 999px; background: var(--primary, #E7B65E); }

narrative.overview: Anti Imposter Club is a companion, not a coach. The whole surface sits in a deep aubergine night (#1B1726) — the app you open late, after the day, when the inner critic is loudest. Into that dark room falls a single warm light: a candle-gold accent (#E7B65E) that marks the one thing worth doing next. Nothing shouts. Warmth is carried by the light and the voice, never by loud color everywhere. A soft, procedural mascot breathes in the corners; motion is gentle and 'alive,' never busy. It is a tool you're in — a guided exercise — but a tool with a heartbeat. It explicitly rejects the cold clinical health app, the hustle/productivity coach, the generic SaaS dashboard, and kitschy wellness esoterica.
keyCharacteristics: Dark aubergine surface throughout — one theme, no light mode.
A single candle-gold accent used sparingly, for the next step and current state.
Serif (Fraunces) for warmth and voice; sans (Geist) for the working UI.
Translucent, frosted glass on hero moments; solid plum on everything else.
Gentle, breathing motion with a reduced-motion fallback everywhere.

rules.name: The One Candle Rule
rules.body: Candle Gold appears on roughly one thing per screen — the primary action or the current state. If two elements are gold, one of them is wrong. The dark room has one light.

rules.name: The Warm-White Rule
rules.body: Text is Moonlight (#F3EFFA), never #FFFFFF. Pure white on aubergine is a cold spike; the warm off-white belongs to the room.

rules.name: The Serif-Is-Voice Rule
rules.body: Fraunces is for language the user should feel — names, affirmations, encouragements. Never set a button, a data value, or a form label in the serif.

rules.name: The Fixed-Scale Rule
rules.body: This is product UI: type sizes are fixed rem steps, not fluid clamp(). A heading that shrinks with the viewport looks worse in a phone-width column, not better.

rules.name: The Glass-Is-Rare Rule
rules.body: Frosted glass is reserved for one or two hero moments per screen. Stacked backdrop-filter layers are expensive on older phones and, used everywhere, they stop meaning 'this one matters.'

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: Separation is a 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.12) edge, never a shadow and never a hard opaque line.

dos: Do keep the aubergine night (#1B1726) as the ground on every surface. One theme, no light mode.
Do obey the One Candle Rule — Candle Gold on ~one element per screen (the next step or current state).
Do use Moonlight (#F3EFFA) for text, and Gold Ink (#2B1B06) on gold fills. Never pure #FFFFFF.
Do set voice — greetings, affirmations, encouragements — in Fraunces; set actions, labels, and data in Geist.
Do build depth from tonal layers + a 1px hairline; reserve frosted glass for 1-2 hero moments per screen.
Do give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion: reduce fallback (crossfade or instant), the breathing mascot included.
Do verify Lavender-Muted (#A89FBE) text against its surface; if a string must be read comfortably, move it toward Moonlight.
donts: Don't ship the cold clinical health app: no medical white, no hospital blue, no wall of form fields.
Don't ship the hustle/productivity coach: no streak-as-pressure, no 'no excuses' alarm-red, no shaming empty states.
Don't ship the generic SaaS dashboard: no interchangeable icon+heading+text card grids, no hero-metric tiles, no corporate-neutral filler.
Don't ship kitschy wellness esoterica: no oversweet pastels, no incense-and-affirmation cliches, no empty mindfulness fluff.
Don't put two gold elements on one screen, or use gold as decoration.
Don't use border-left/border-right >1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or callouts.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) or glassmorphism as a default surface.
Don't reach for a solitary tiny tracked-uppercase eyebrow above every section as scaffolding.
Don't nest cards, and don't fluid-clamp() product type — fixed rem steps only.
